entities.name: CROPPING SYSTEMS
entities.description: The arrangement and sequence of crops grown on a piece of land

entities.name: INTERCROPPING
entities.description: The practice of growing two or more crops simultaneously on the same field

entities.name: SINGLE-CROPPING
entities.description: The practice of growing only one crop on a field

entities.name: FALLOW
entities.description: Leaving the land unseeded for a period of time

entities.name: INOCULUM DENSITY
entities.description: The concentration of the pathogen in the soil

relationships.description: Influence the populations of the pathogen in soil
Leads to higher counts of sclerotia compared to single-cropping
Associated with higher sclerotia counts when intercropped with pigeon pea
Associated with higher sclerotia counts when intercropped with pigeon pea
Associated with higher sclerotia counts when intercropped with sorghum or cowpea
Associated with an increase in sclerotia populations when following rainy season sorghum
